description_long: This is a two-tiered celebration cake with a smooth beige exterior and a glossy, dark chocolate ganache drip cascading down both layers. The cake is lavishly decorated with numerous bright red, cone-shaped candies or strawberries arranged in a ring around the base and the top tier, creating a striking visual contrast. The top of the cake features a cluster of these red decorations, along with a few candles, suggesting it is intended for a birthday or special occasion. The cake sits on a round, white cake stand with a subtle gold rim, elevating its presentation. The overall appearance is festive and indulgent, with a modern drip-style finish and vibrant, eye-catching colors. The surface of the cake appears soft and moist, typical of a freshly made dessert.
description: A two-tiered cake with chocolate ganache drip, red cone-shaped decorations, and candles, presented on a white cake stand. The cake is festive and visually striking with a modern drip style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chocolate ganache drip, red cone-shaped decorations, and several candles on the top tier.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense arrangement of red decorations around both tiers and a clearer view of the cake's layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the chocolate drip and the symmetrical placement of red decorations, with fewer candles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the cake, with the cluster of candles and red decorations on the top tier more prominent.
